author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
This issue requires 4 separate GPU kernels (BatchNorm, GroupNorm, MaxPool2d, AvgPool2d). Each is a substantial implementation:
- BatchNorm: per-channel reduction (mean, var) + normalization + affine + running stats update
- GroupNorm: per-group reduction + normalization  
- MaxPool2d: sliding window with index tracking
- AvgPool2d: sliding window sum + divide

These would ideally use cuDNN (which handles all of them), but we don't have cuDNN bindings beyond cuBLAS. Composing from primitives is possible but less efficient. Marking this for a dedicated GPU kernel sprint.
